title: Asteria University Mod
description: A specialized mod made just for the Asteria University Roleplay Server, a modern fantasy setting.
body:
A specialized mod made just for the Asteria University Roleplay Server, a modern fantasy setting where students learn magic. It is **not** meant for general use outside of this specific setting, and no support will be provided for it.

It adds roleplay-specific functionality, such as chat niceties, a custom in-game clock, and so on.

You can learn more about and join the server here:
https://discord.gg/SGspNAPzuC
